title: Joint Global Fluctuations of complex Wigner and deterministic Matrices
author_string: Camile Male, James A. Mingo, Sandrine Péché, Roland Speicher
abstract: We characterize the limiting fluctuations of traces of several independent Wigner matrices and deterministic matrices under mild conditions. A CLT holds but in general the families are not asymptotically free of second order and the limiting covariance depends on more information on the deterministic matrices than their limiting *-distribution.
